soilPreparation.title: Toyang Junbireul Wihan Haeksim Tip
soilPreparation.excerpt: Daum nongsa season e yield reul nopyeojuneun soil preparation jeonmun tips...
soilPreparation.author: Admin
points: Tip: Choose the right tiller for your soil type.
Tip: Remove weeds and leftover crop residue before planting.
Tip: Maintain proper soil moisture before tilling.
Tip: Use cultivators for better aeration and root growth.
Tip: Break large soil clods before seed placement.
Tip: Level the field to avoid waterlogging in low spots.
Tip: Add compost or organic manure before final cultivation.
Tip: Avoid working soil when it is too wet or sticky.
Tip: Check soil pH and correct nutrient imbalance early.
Tip: Prepare raised beds for vegetables and delicate crops.
Tip: Keep tiller blades clean and sharp for uniform soil mixing.
Tip: Use shallow cultivation around existing roots.
Tip: Plan drainage channels before the rainy season.
Tip: Rotate crops to maintain soil health.
Tip: Do a final light pass before sowing for smooth seed beds.

powerTools.title: Dongryeok Gonggu Gwanri
powerTools.excerpt: Industrial power tools reul oraen dongan anjeonhage sseugi wihan cleaning and maintenance guide...
powerTools.author: Agri Expert
points: Tip: Clean tools after every use.
Tip: Remove soil, dust, and crop residue from blades.
Tip: Check engine oil before starting.
Tip: Clean or replace air filters regularly.
Tip: Tighten loose nuts, bolts, and screws.
Tip: Sharpen blades when cutting performance decreases.
Tip: Check fuel lines for leakage.
Tip: Store tools in a dry and shaded place.
Tip: Lubricate moving parts regularly.
Tip: Inspect power cables and switches.
Tip: Replace damaged blades immediately.
Tip: Use only recommended fuel or power source.
Tip: Avoid overloading the machine.
Tip: Follow manufacturer safety instructions.
Tip: Service the tool at regular intervals.

irrigation.title: Hyeondae Gwan-gae Gisul
irrigation.excerpt: India modern agriculture reul bakkuneun water-saving irrigation systems soge...
irrigation.author: Editor
points: Tip: Use drip irrigation to save water in row crops.
Tip: Maintain pumps and filters regularly.
Tip: Choose quality hoses, pipes, and connectors.
Tip: Monitor water pressure during irrigation.
Tip: Install filters before drip lines to reduce clogging.
Tip: Flush drip pipes at regular intervals.
Tip: Use sprinklers for even coverage in open fields.
Tip: Select pump capacity based on field size and head height.
Tip: Repair leaks quickly to prevent water loss.
Tip: Schedule irrigation early morning or evening.
Tip: Group crops with similar water needs together.
Tip: Use rain guns for larger field coverage.
Tip: Check nozzles for blockage before every cycle.
Tip: Protect pipes from direct damage during field operations.
Tip: Track soil moisture before increasing watering time.
